endpoints.name: POST /providers/{managementGroupsNamespace}/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyTrackedResources/{policyTrackedResourcesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy tracked resources under the management group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPSNAMESPACE}} with a real managementgroupsnamespace. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname. Replace {{POLICYTRACKEDRESOURCESRESOURCE}} with a real policytrackedresourcesresource.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyTrackedResources/{policyTrackedResourcesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy tracked resources under the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYTRACKEDRESOURCESRESOURCE}} with a real policytrackedresourcesresource.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyTrackedResources/{policyTrackedResourcesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy tracked resources under the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POLICYTRACKEDRESOURCESRESOURCE}} with a real policytrackedresourcesresource.

endpoints.name: POST /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyTrackedResources/{policyTrackedResourcesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy tracked resources under the resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid. Replace {{POLICYTRACKEDRESOURCESRESOURCE}} with a real policytrackedresourcesresource.
